name: Mocha Mint Mousse Tart
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare brownie mix according to package directions in a greased 9-inch round pan; cool.
2. In a mixing bowl, dissolve instant coffee powder in hot water.
3. Add cream cheese to the coffee mixture and beat until smooth.
4. Blend in marshmallow creme using an electric mixer until smooth.
5. Melt Junior Mints by placing them in a microwave-safe bowl and heating on HIGH for 1.5 to 2 minutes, stirring until smooth. Alternatively, place them in a small saucepan and stir over low heat until melted.
6. Stir the melted Junior Mints into the mixture until combined; the chocolate will form slivers in the mixture.
7. Fold in whipped cream and spread onto the cooled brownies.
8. Loosely cover and chill for several hours or overnight.
9. To serve, cut into wedges and garnish as desired.
